entry.title: Welcome to Olive
entry.description: Your AI-powered life organizer for couples
entry.createAccountDesc: Set up your space in under a minute
entry.loginDesc: Welcome back to your organized life
entry.noPassword: Sign in with a verification code or password
entry.secureLogin: Sign in with a verification code or password

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Access your notes, lists, and preferences.
signIn.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email!
signIn.passkeyNotAvailable: Passkey not available. Please use another sign-in method.
signIn.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported on this device.
signIn.passkeyNotFound: No passkey found for this device. Sign in with email first, then create a passkey from your Profile settings.
signIn.passkeyError: Passkey sign-in failed. Try another method.

passkey.promptDescription: Create a passkey to sign in instantly with Face ID, Touch ID, or your device PIN. No more codes or passwords.
passkey.benefit1: Sign in with Face ID or fingerprint
passkey.benefit2: No codes to type or remember
passkey.created: Passkey created! You can now sign in with biometrics.
passkey.cancelled: Passkey creation was cancelled. You can try again from Profile settings.
passkey.notSupported: Passkeys are not supported on this device.
passkey.error: Failed to create passkey. Try again later.

nativeWelcome.eyebrow: Shared memory for the people you care about
nativeWelcome.headline: She remembers, so you don't have to.
nativeWelcome.subheadline: Drop anything — gate codes, grocery lists, dinner plans. Olive organizes it all and gives it back, clean and sorted, the moment you need it.
nativeWelcome.trustSignal: Free during Beta. Your data stays yours.
nativeWelcome.stepDropDesc: Text, voice, photo, or link — just send it.
nativeWelcome.stepOrganizeDesc: Olive reads it, files it, remembers it.
nativeWelcome.stepFindDesc: Ask Olive anything. She knows where it is.
nativeWelcome.modesSubtext: Same Olive. The Space adapts to who's in it — solo brain dump, couple, family, or team.
nativeWelcome.modeSoloPain: You text yourself reminders, links, ideas. They die in a chat with yourself. Olive catches them all.
nativeWelcome.modeCouplePain: One of you remembers everything. The other forgets. Olive holds both sides — without anyone having to nag.
nativeWelcome.modeFamilyPain: Soccer practice, grandma's recipe, the gate code — everything your family is too busy to write down. Olive remembers it all.
nativeWelcome.modeBusinessPain: Client decisions, deadlines, expenses — log them once, find them forever. No spreadsheet required.
nativeWelcome.channelsSubtext: No new app to learn. Forward a voice note from WhatsApp, snap a photo, paste a link — it all lands with Olive.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Join Olive and set up your space in minutes.
signUp.nameHint: So we can personalize your experience
signUp.emailHint: We'll send you a verification code
signUp.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email!
